wine_restaurants.name: Ambivium
wine_restaurants.address: Camino de Carraovejas s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Creative Spanish with Ribera del Duero wine focus; seasonal tasting menus built around food preservation and hyperlocal produce
wine_restaurants.description: One Michelin star restaurant at Pago de Carraovejas estate in Penafiel. Tasting menus are built around food preservation methods and hyperlocal seasonal produce; 5,600-label cellar anchored by the estate's own Ribera del Duero wines.

verified.address_quoted: Camino de Carraovejas, s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Espana

wine_restaurants.name: Refectorio
wine_restaurants.address: Monasterio de Santa Maria, 122 Km. 332.5, 47340 Sardon de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Creative market cuisine in 12th-century abbey refectory; seasonal Terroir, Origin and Legacy tasting menus
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant in the original 12th-century refectory of the Abadia Retuerta abbey in Sardon de Duero. Terroir, Origin and Legacy tasting menus; 500-wine list spans estate pagos and a broad selection of Spanish and international bottles.

verified.address_quoted: Monasterio de Santa Maria, 122 Km. 332, 5, 47340 Retuerta, Valladolid, Spain

wine_restaurants.name: Taller Arzuaga
wine_restaurants.address: Carretera N-122 Km 325, 47350 Quintanilla de Onesimo, Valladolid, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Creative wine-country cuisine with produce from the estate organic garden; two tasting menu formats
wine_restaurants.description: One Michelin star and one Sol Repsol restaurant at the Arzuaga estate on the Golden Mile. Creative menu drawing on the organic garden and estate terroir; wine list showcases Arzuaga Ribera del Duero ranges alongside Spanish classics.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera N-122, Quintanilla de Onesimo, 47350, Spain

wine_restaurants.name: Asador Casa Florencio
wine_restaurants.address: C/ Isilla 14, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Traditional Castilian asador; lechazo asado (roast suckling lamb) in wood-fired oven; IGP Lechazo de Castilla y Leon certified

awards.source: IGP Lechazo de Castilla y Leon quality mark

wine_restaurants.description: Family asador in Aranda de Duero since 1949. Roast suckling lamb from IGP-certified Lechazo de Castilla y Leon, cooked in a wood-fired oven; wine list focuses on DO Ribera del Duero including Callejo estate wines. A classic pairing address in the heart of the zone.

verified.address_quoted: C/ Isilla 14, 09400 Aranda de Duero, BURGOS

wine_restaurants.name: El Lagar de Isilla
wine_restaurants.address: C/ Isilla 18, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Castilian grill and asador; roast suckling lamb; wine list of 450+ references in 13th-century underground cellar
wine_restaurants.description: Aranda de Duero grill-restaurant with a 450-reference wine list preserved 12 m below street level in 13th-century underground cellars. Free cellar visit during service; the wine offering spans DO Ribera del Duero, Rioja, Rueda and beyond.

verified.address_quoted: C. Isilla, 18, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain

wine_restaurants.name: El Converso at Castilla Termal Monasterio de Valbuena
wine_restaurants.address: San Bernardo s/n, 47359 Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Creative regional cuisine in a 12th-century Cistercian monastery; tasting menus of 6-10 courses; Converso estate wine on the list
wine_restaurants.description: Restaurant in the historic Cistercian Monasterio de Valbuena, one of Europe's best-preserved 12th-century monasteries. Tasting menus present classic Castilian dishes with modern technique; the hotel's own Converso Tempranillo features prominently on the regional wine list.

verified.address_quoted: San Bernardo, Valbuena de Duero, Valladolid

wine_restaurants.name: Molino de Palacios
wine_restaurants.address: Av. de la Constitucion 16, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Castilian grill in a 16th-century restored flour mill; roast lamb, game and mushroom specialties; extensive Ribera del Duero wine list

awards.source: Asociacion Chefs de Castilla y Leon

wine_restaurants.description: Restored 16th-century flour mill on the Duraton river in Penafiel. Member of the Castile and Leon Master Chefs Association; wood-fired roast lamb, marinated game and seasonal mushrooms paired with an extensive DO Ribera del Duero wine list.

verified.address_quoted: Av. de la Constitucion, 16, 47300 - Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurante Emilio Moro
wine_restaurants.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria s/n, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Castilian wine-country cuisine; roast suckling lamb; complete Emilio Moro estate wine list
wine_restaurants.description: Estate restaurant at Bodegas Emilio Moro on the Golden Mile. Gastronomic experience package includes the full winery visit followed by a seasonal menu with roast lechazo; exclusively the Emilio Moro wine range paired with each course.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria, S/N, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurante Torremilanos
wine_restaurants.address: Nacional 122 Km. 274, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Traditional Castilian cuisine and creative dishes; roast suckling lamb; wine list from the estate and wider Ribera del Duero DO
wine_restaurants.description: Restaurant within the Finca Torremilanos estate hotel in Aranda de Duero, one of the founding producers of the DO Ribera del Duero. Traditional roast lamb alongside creative seasonal dishes; the estate's own biodynamic wines anchor the list.

verified.address_quoted: Nacional 122, km. 274, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos

wine_restaurants.name: Guyot at LaVida
wine_restaurants.address: Plaza Mayor 1, Torre de Penafiel, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Regional wine-country cuisine in a 17th-century village wine press; focus on Castilla y Leon terroir; vinotherapy spa hotel setting
wine_restaurants.description: Restaurant within the LaVida Vino Spa Hotel in Torre de Penafiel, set inside the restored 17th-century communal wine press of the village. Wine-focused menu drawing on the Ribera del Duero zone; vinotherapy treatments available in the adjacent spa.

verified.address_quoted: Plaza Mayor No 1, Torre De Penafiel, Spain

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurante Comenge
wine_restaurants.address: Camino del Castillo s/n, 47346 Curiel del Duero, Valladolid, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Quality gastronomy with local organic produce; panoramic views from the castle-side terrace; exclusive Comenge organic wine list
wine_restaurants.description: Panoramic restaurant at Bodegas Comenge at the base of Curiel de Duero castle. Reservation required; quality cuisine paired exclusively with the organic Comenge estate range; castle and vine views from the terrace.

verified.address_quoted: Camino del Castillo s/n, 47346 Curiel del Duero, Spain

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurante Pago de los Capellanes
wine_restaurants.address: Camino de los Capellanes s/n, 09314 Pedrosa de Duero, Burgos, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Wine-pairing cellar restaurant in a barrel-aged room; seasonal menu designed around Ribera del Duero Tempranillo
wine_restaurants.description: Estate restaurant at the Pago de los Capellanes winery in Pedrosa de Duero. Seasonal menus designed to complement the estate's Crianza, Reserva and single-parcel wines; underground barrel cellar provides the dining setting.
